title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rackspace India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!
